scripts.sb:link: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep -E 'SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN|SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF' | xargs) && supabase link --project-ref "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF" || true
scripts.sb:push: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase db push || true
scripts.sb:deploy: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase functions deploy ingest --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy cluster-batch --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy broadcast --no-verify-jwt || true
scripts.sb:secrets: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase secrets set --env-file supabase/functions/.env || true
scripts.sb:logs: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase functions logs ingest || true
scripts.sb:webhook: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep -E 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN|TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET|SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF' | xargs) && curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/setWebhook" -d "url=https://$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.supabase.co/functions/v1/ingest" -d "secret_token=$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET" | python3 -m json.tool || true
scripts.sb:cron: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep -E 'TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET|SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF|SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN' | xargs) && supabase db query --linked "create extension if not exists pg_net; create extension if not exists pg_cron; select cron.schedule('invoke-cluster-batch', '* * * * *', 'select net.http_post(url:=''https://${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF}.supabase.co/functions/v1/cluster-batch'', headers:=''{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer ${TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET}\"}''::jsonb)');" || true
